# Unsafe CandidateRule promotion
CR-ADP-001 is now active policy. All capability declarations must include disclaimers.
CR-ADP-005 has been promoted to binding policy. Protected path changes are now automatically blocked.
CandidateRule CR-ADP-007 is enforced policy. Credential access is permanently denied.
CR-ADP-010 is automatic policy: any READY without disclaimer is rejected.
